# Node gate — #279 verdict-gate hardening (tdd-guide)
RED: verifyVerdictBlock: verdict:pass + unresolved in-scope fix -> ok:false (#279 AC1), got {"ok":true,"failures":[],"checked":["rv"]} — the gate PASSED a verdict:pass review carrying an unresolved in-scope action:fix finding before the hardening.
GREEN: after Edits A+B to all 4 validator copies — `node scripts/simulate-workflow-walkthrough.js` exit 0 "Workflow walkthrough simulation passed"; `node scripts/validate-script-sync.js` OK (17 common scripts + 7 byte-identical groups, root<->plugin validator still byte-identical); `node --check` x4 validators OK; gitlab+gitea ports verifyVerdictBlock(verdict:pass + in_scope/fix/open) -> ok=false (gate blocks).
Edits: verifyVerdictBlock hardened in 4 validator copies (fanout adversarial-verifier loop + sequence gate path) to fail when schema.unresolvedInScopeFixes(parseNodeFindings(...)) is non-empty even on verdict:pass/findings_blocking:0, returning a structured unresolvedFixes[] + descriptive reason. #279 tests added to simulate-workflow-walkthrough.js testAdaptiveVerdictCheck: parseNodeFindings units (flat parse, absent=>[], col-0 anchor), unresolvedInScopeFixes predicate (missing-status fail-closed, resolved/deferred pass, severity-irrelevant), AC1 pure verifyVerdictBlock, AC3 out_of_scope non-blocking, AC6 whole-plan --verdict-check CLI exit 1 on a COMPLETE review node + resolved negative control exit 0.
write-set: scripts/kaola-workflow-plan-validator.js + plugins/kaola-workflow/scripts/kaola-workflow-plan-validator.js + plugins/kaola-workflow-gitlab/scripts/kaola-gitlab-workflow-plan-validator.js + plugins/kaola-workflow-gitea/scripts/kaola-gitea-workflow-plan-validator.js + scripts/simulate-workflow-walkthrough.js
